sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  Box,
  Typography,
  Card,
  CardContent,
  Grid,
  Tabs,
  Tab,
  Table,
  TableBody,
  TableCell,
  TableContainer,
  TableHead,
  TableRow,
  Paper,
  Chip,
  Button,
  LinearProgress,
  Avatar,
  IconButton,
  Tooltip,
  Select,
  MenuItem,
  FormControl,
  InputLabel,
  Alert,
  AlertTitle,
} from '@mui/material';
import { 
  Analytics, 
  Download, 
  Timeline, 
  TrendingUp, 
  TrendingDown,
  Warning,
  CheckCircle,
  Error,
  Refresh,
  FilterList,
  CalendarToday,
  Assessment,
  Straighten,
  AccessTime,
} from '@mui/icons-material';
import PostureChart from '../components/PostureChart';

const drawerWidth = 240;

const PostureAnalysis = () => {
  const [tabValue, setTabValue] = useState(0);
  const [timeFilter, setTimeFilter] = useState('today');
  const [postureData] = useState({
    averageScore: 85,
    goodPostureTime: '6.5h',
    alertsToday: 12,
    weeklyTrend: 5.2,
    spinalAlignment: 92,
    riskLevel: 'Low',
  });

  const analysisData = [
    { time: '09:00', posture: 'Good', duration: '45 min', angle: '12°', risk: 'Low', score: 92 },
    { time: '10:30', posture: 'Fair', duration: '30 min', angle: '18°', risk: 'Medium', score: 78 },
    { time: '12:00', posture: 'Poor', duration: '15 min', angle: '28°', risk: 'High', score: 45 },
    { time: '14:15', posture: 'Good', duration: '60 min', angle: '10°', risk: 'Low', score: 95 },
    { time: '16:00', posture: 'Fair', duration: '25 min', angle: '20°', risk: 'Medium', score: 72 },
    { time: '17:30', posture: 'Excellent', duration: '40 min', angle: '8°', risk: 'Low', score: 98 },
  ];

  const weeklyData = [
    { day: 'Mon', score: 82, goodTime: '5.2h', alerts: 8 },
    { day: 'Tue', score: 78, goodTime: '4.8h', alerts: 12 },
    { day: 'Wed', score: 85, goodTime: '6.1h', alerts: 6 },
    { day: 'Thu', score: 88, goodTime: '6.5h', alerts: 4 },
    { day: 'Fri', score: 91, goodTime: '7.2h', alerts: 3 },
    { day: 'Sat', score: 89, goodTime: '6.8h', alerts: 5 },
    { day: 'Sun', score: 85, goodTime: '6.5h', alerts: 7 },
  ];

  const recommendations = [
    {
      type: 'warning',
      title: 'Prolonged Poor Posture Detected',
      message: 'You maintained poor posture for 15 minutes around 12:00 PM. Consider taking breaks.',
      time: '2 hours ago'
    },
    {
      type: 'success',
      title: 'Great Improvement!',
      message: 'Your posture score improved by 12% compared to yesterday.',
      time: '1 hour ago'
    },
    {
      type: 'info',
      title: 'Reminder',
      message: 'Time for your scheduled posture check. Stand up and stretch!',
      time: '30 minutes ago'
    }
  ];

  const getPostureColor = (posture) => {
    switch (posture) {
      case 'Excellent': return 'success';
      case 'Good': return 'info';
      case 'Fair': return 'warning';
      case 'Poor': return 'error';
      default: return 'default';
    }
  };

  const getRiskColor = (risk) => {
    switch (risk) {
      case 'Low': return 'success';
      case 'Medium': return 'warning';
      case 'High': return 'error';
      default: return 'default';
    }
  };

  // Circular Progress Component
  const CircularProgress = ({ value, size = 100, strokeWidth = 8, color = '#4F46E5', label }) => {
    const radius = (size - strokeWidth) / 2;
    const circumference = radius * 2 * Math.PI;
    const offset = circumference - (value / 100) * circumference;

    return (
      <Box sx={{ position: 'relative', display: 'inline-flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }}>
        <svg width={size} height={size}>
          <circle
            cx={size / 2}
            cy={size / 2}
            r={radius}
            stroke="#E5E7EB"
            strokeWidth={strokeWidth}
            fill="transparent"
          />
          <circle
            cx={size / 2}
            cy={size / 2}
            r={radius}
            stroke={color}
            strokeWidth={strokeWidth}
            fill="transparent"
            strokeDasharray={circumference}
            strokeDashoffset={offset}
            strokeLinecap="round"
            style={{
              transition: 'stroke-dashoffset 0.5s ease-in-out',
              transform: 'rotate(-90deg)',
              transformOrigin: '50% 50%',
            }}
          />
        </svg>
        <Box
          sx={{
            position: 'absolute',
            display: 'flex',
            flexDirection: 'column',
            alignItems: 'center',
            justifyContent: 'center',
          }}
        >
          <Typography variant="h5" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, color: color }}>
            {value}%
          </Typography>
          {label && (
            <Typography variant="caption" sx={{ color: 'text.secondary', textAlign: 'center' }}>
              {label}
            </Typography>
          )}
        </Box>
      </Box>
    );
  };

  return (
    <Box
      component="main"
      sx={{
        flexGrow: 1,
        ml: `${drawerWidth}px`,
        mt: '64px',
        p: 3,
        minHeight: '100vh',
        backgroundColor: 'background.default',
      }}
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 3 }}>
        <Box>
          <Typography variant="h4" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, mb: 1 }}>
            Posture Analysis
          </Typography>
          <Typography variant="body1" color="text.secondary">
            Comprehensive analysis of your posture patterns and trends
          </Typography>
        </Box>
        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 1 }}>
          <FormControl size="small" sx={{ minWidth: 120 }}>
            <InputLabel>Time Period</InputLabel>
            <Select
              value={timeFilter}
              label="Time Period"
              onChange={(e) => setTimeFilter(e.target.value)}
            >
              <MenuItem value="today">Today</MenuItem>
              <MenuItem value="week">This Week</MenuItem>
              <MenuItem value="month">This Month</MenuItem>
            </Select>
          </FormControl>
          <Tooltip title="Refresh Data">
            <IconButton 
              sx={{ 
                bgcolor: 'primary.main', 
                color: 'white',
                '&:hover': { bgcolor: 'primary.dark' }
              }}
            >
              <Refresh />
            </IconButton>
          </Tooltip>
          <Button
            variant="contained"
            startIcon={<Download />}
            sx={{ borderRadius: 2 }}
          >
            Export Report
          </Button>
        </Box>
      </Box>
      {/* Key Metrics Cards */}
      <Grid container spacing={3} sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Card>
            <CardContent sx={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
              <Avatar sx={{ bgcolor: 'primary.main', mx: 'auto', mb: 2, width: 56, height: 56 }}>
                <Assessment sx={{ fontSize: 28 }} />
              </Avatar>
              <Typography variant="h4" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, mb: 1 }}>
                {postureData.averageScore}%
              </Typography>
              <Typography color="text.secondary" variant="body2">
                Average Score
              </Typography>
              <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 1 }}>
                <TrendingUp sx={{ color: 'success.main', mr: 0.5, fontSize: 16 }} />
                <Typography variant="caption" color="success.main" sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>
                  +{postureData.weeklyTrend}%
                </Typography>
              </Box>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </Grid>
        
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Card>
            <CardContent sx={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
              <Avatar sx={{ bgcolor: 'success.main', mx: 'auto', mb: 2, width: 56, height: 56 }}>
                <AccessTime sx={{ fontSize: 28 }} />
              </Avatar>
              <Typography variant="h4" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, mb: 1 }}>
                {postureData.goodPostureTime}
              </Typography>
              <Typography color="text.secondary" variant="body2">
                Good Posture Time
              </Typography>
              <LinearProgress 
                variant="determinate" 
                value={75} 
                sx={{ mt: 1, height: 6, borderRadius: 3 }}
                color="success"
              />
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </Grid>
        
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Card>
            <CardContent sx={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
              <Avatar sx={{ bgcolor: 'warning.main', mx: 'auto', mb: 2, width: 56, height: 56 }}>
                <Warning sx={{ fontSize: 28 }} />
              </Avatar>
              <Typography variant="h4" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, mb: 1 }}>
                {postureData.alertsToday}
              </Typography>
              <Typography color="text.secondary" variant="body2">
                Alerts Today
              </Typography>
              <Chip 
                label={postureData.alertsToday < 10 ? "Good" : "High"} 
                color={postureData.alertsToday < 10 ? "success" : "warning"} 
                size="small" 
                sx={{ mt: 1 }}
              />
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </Grid>

        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Card>
            <CardContent sx={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
              <Avatar sx={{ bgcolor: 'info.main', mx: 'auto', mb: 2, width: 56, height: 56 }}>
                <Straighten sx={{ fontSize: 28 }} />
              </Avatar>
              <Typography variant="h4" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, mb: 1 }}>
                {postureData.spinalAlignment}%
              </Typography>
              <Typography color="text.secondary" variant="body2">
                Spinal Alignment
              </Typography>
              <Chip 
                label={postureData.riskLevel} 
                color={getRiskColor(postureData.riskLevel)} 
                size="small" 
                sx={{ mt: 1 }}
              />
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </Grid>
      </Grid>

      {/* Real-time Posture Metrics */}
      <Grid container spacing={3} sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
        <Grid item xs={12} md={8}>
          <Card>
            <CardContent>
              <Typography variant="h6" sx={{ fontWeight: 600, mb: 3 }}>
                Real-time Posture Metrics
              </Typography>
              <Grid container spacing={4} sx={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
                <Grid item xs={12} sm={4}>
                  <CircularProgress 
                    value={postureData.averageScore} 
                    color="#4F46E5" 
                    label="Overall Score"
                  />
                </Grid>
                <Grid item xs={12} sm={4}>
                  <CircularProgress 
                    value={postureData.spinalAlignment} 
                    color="#10B981" 
                    label="Alignment"
                  />
                </Grid>
                <Grid item xs={12} sm={4}>
                  <CircularProgress 
                    value={78} 
                    color="#F59E0B" 
                    label="Stability"
                  />
                </Grid>
              </Grid>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </Grid>

        <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
          <Card sx={{ height: '100%' }}>
            <CardContent>
              <Typography variant="h6" sx={{ fontWeight: 600, mb: 3 }}>
                Recent Alerts
              </Typography>
              <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 2 }}>
                {recommendations.slice(0, 3).map((rec, index) => (
                  <Alert 
                    key={index} 
                    severity={rec.type === 'warning' ? 'warning' : rec.type === 'success' ? 'success' : 'info'}
                    sx={{ fontSize: '0.75rem' }}
                  >
                    <AlertTitle sx={{ fontSize: '0.8rem', fontWeight: 600 }}>
                      {rec.title}
                    </AlertTitle>
                    <Typography variant="caption" display="block">
                      {rec.message}
                    </Typography>
                    <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">
                      {rec.time}
                    </Typography>
                  </Alert>
                ))}
              </Box>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </Grid>
      </Grid>
      {/* Analysis Tabs */}
      <Grid container spacing={3}>
        <Grid item xs={12}>
          <Card>
            <Box sx={{ borderBottom: 1, borderColor: 'divider' }}>
              <Tabs 
                value={tabValue} 
                onChange={(_, newValue) => setTabValue(newValue)}
                sx={{ px: 2 }}
              >
                <Tab 
                  label="Daily Analysis" 
                  icon={<CalendarToday />} 
                  iconPosition="start"
                  sx={{ minHeight: 48 }}
                />
                <Tab 
                  label="Weekly Trends" 
                  icon={<Timeline />} 
                  iconPosition="start"
                  sx={{ minHeight: 48 }}
                />
                <Tab 
                  label="Detailed Log" 
                  icon={<FilterList />} 
                  iconPosition="start"
                  sx={{ minHeight: 48 }}
                />
              </Tabs>
            </Box>
            
            <CardContent>
              {tabValue === 0 && (
                <Box>
                  <Typography variant="h6" sx={{ fontWeight: 600, mb: 3 }}>
                    Today's Posture Analysis
                  </Typography>
                  <PostureChart />
                  
                  {/* Daily Summary */}
                  <Grid container spacing={2} sx={{ mt: 3 }}>
                    <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
                      <Paper sx={{ p: 2, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                        <Typography variant="h5" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, color: 'primary.main' }}>
                          8.2h
                        </Typography>
                        <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
                          Total Monitoring
                        </Typography>
                      </Paper>
                    </Grid>
                    <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
                      <Paper sx={{ p: 2, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                        <Typography variant="h5" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, color: 'success.main' }}>
                          6.5h
                        </Typography>
                        <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
                          Good Posture
                        </Typography>
                      </Paper>
                    </Grid>
                    <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
                      <Paper sx={{ p: 2, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                        <Typography variant="h5" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, color: 'warning.main' }}>
                          1.2h
                        </Typography>
                        <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
                          Fair Posture
                        </Typography>
                      </Paper>
                    </Grid>
                    <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
                      <Paper sx={{ p: 2, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                        <Typography variant="h5" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, color: 'error.main' }}>
                          0.5h
                        </Typography>
                        <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
                          Poor Posture
                        </Typography>
                      </Paper>
                    </Grid>
                  </Grid>
                </Box>
              )}
              
              {tabValue === 1 && (
                <Box>
                  <Typography variant="h6" sx={{ fontWeight: 600, mb: 3 }}>
                    Weekly Posture Trends
                  </Typography>
                  <PostureChart />
                  
                  {/* Weekly Summary Table */}
                  <TableContainer component={Paper} sx={{ mt: 3 }}>
                    <Table>
                      <TableHead>
                        <TableRow>
                          <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Day</TableCell>
                          <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Average Score</TableCell>
                          <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Good Posture Time</TableCell>
                          <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Alerts</TableCell>
                          <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Trend</TableCell>
                        </TableRow>
                      </TableHead>
                      <TableBody>
                        {weeklyData.map((day, index) => (
                          <TableRow key={index} hover>
                            <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 500 }}>{day.day}</TableCell>
                            <TableCell>
                              <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                                <Typography sx={{ fontWeight: 600, mr: 1 }}>
                                  {day.score}%
                                </Typography>
                                <LinearProgress 
                                  variant="determinate" 
                                  value={day.score} 
                                  sx={{ width: 60, height: 6, borderRadius: 3 }}
                                />
                              </Box>
                            </TableCell>
                            <TableCell>{day.goodTime}</TableCell>
                            <TableCell>
                              <Chip
                                label={day.alerts}
                                color={day.alerts < 5 ? 'success' : day.alerts < 10 ? 'warning' : 'error'}
                                size="small"
                              />
                            </TableCell>
                            <TableCell>
                              {index > 0 && (
                                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                                  {day.score > weeklyData[index - 1].score ? (
                                    <TrendingUp sx={{ color: 'success.main', mr: 0.5, fontSize: 16 }} />
                                  ) : (
                                    <TrendingDown sx={{ color: 'error.main', mr: 0.5, fontSize: 16 }} />
                                  )}
                                  <Typography 
                                    variant="body2" 
                                    sx={{ 
                                      color: day.score > weeklyData[index - 1].score ? 'success.main' : 'error.main',
                                      fontWeight: 600,
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {Math.abs(day.score - weeklyData[index - 1].score)}%
                                  </Typography>
                                </Box>
                              )}
                            </TableCell>
                          </TableRow>
                        ))}
                      </TableBody>
                    </Table>
                  </TableContainer>
                </Box>
              )}
              
              {tabValue === 2 && (
                <Box>
                  <Typography variant="h6" sx={{ fontWeight: 600, mb: 3 }}>
                    Detailed Posture Log
                  </Typography>
                  <TableContainer component={Paper}>
                    <Table>
                      <TableHead>
                        <TableRow>
                          <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Time</TableCell>
                          <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Posture Status</TableCell>
                          <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Duration</TableCell>
                          <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Spinal Angle</TableCell>
                          <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Risk Level</TableCell>
                          <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Score</TableCell>
                        </TableRow>
                      </TableHead>
                      <TableBody>
                        {analysisData.map((row, index) => (
                          <TableRow key={index} hover>
                            <TableCell sx={{ fontWeight: 500 }}>{row.time}</TableCell>
                            <TableCell>
                              <Chip
                                label={row.posture}
                                color={getPostureColor(row.posture)}
                                size="small"
                              />
                            </TableCell>
                            <TableCell>{row.duration}</TableCell>
                            <TableCell>
                              <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                                <Straighten sx={{ mr: 0.5, fontSize: 16, color: 'text.secondary' }} />
                                {row.angle}
                              </Box>
                            </TableCell>
                            <TableCell>
                              <Chip
                                label={row.risk}
                                color={getRiskColor(row.risk)}
                                size="small"
                                variant="outlined"
                              />
                            </TableCell>
                            <TableCell>
                              <Typography 
                                sx={{ 
                                  fontWeight: 600,
                                  color: row.score >= 90 ? 'success.main' : 
                                         row.score >= 70 ? 'warning.main' : 'error.main'
                                }}
                              >
                                {row.score}%
                              </Typography>
                            </TableCell>
                          </TableRow>
                        ))}
                      </TableBody>
                    </Table>
                  </TableContainer>
                </Box>
              )}
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </Grid>
      </Grid>
    </Box>
  );
};

export default PostureAnalysis;
